title: Knowledge Conflict
description: An explicit recording of contradictory knowledge. Conflicts are first-class knowledge entities — both sides must be preserved for correct retrieval and evaluation.

conflict_type.description: Type of conflict. DIRECT_FACTUAL: same claim, opposite truth values. METHODOLOGICAL: different methods yield different results. INTERPRETIVE: same data, different conclusions. TEMPORAL: valid at different times. SCOPE: different applicability domains. DEFINITIONAL: different definitions. CAUSAL_DIRECTION: disagreement about cause/effect direction. MEASUREMENT: different measured values. PREDICTIVE: different predictions. PRESCRIPTIVE: different recommended actions. SOURCE_QUALITY: conflicting sources of different quality. UNRESOLVED_EVIDENCE: both sides plausible, evidence insufficient.

description.description: Detailed explanation of the conflict, its nature, and implications.

impact_assessment.description: How much this conflict matters for downstream knowledge use.
